title: helianthemum pannosum
intro: Helianthemum pannosum, also known as the rock rose, is a flowering plant species native to Europe and Asia. The rock rose is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. It is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and aiding in wound healing. The herbal preparations of Helianthemum pannosum include teas, tinctures, and topical creams, which can be used to soothe skin irritations and promote overall well-being.
